simple_explanation: Getting your business name officially recorded.
detailed_explanation: The process of incorporating a legal entity to grant it a separate personality from the owners.

simple_explanation: A unique ID for paying government taxes.
detailed_explanation: A mandatory 10-digit number assigned by the tax office for all corporate tax filings and tracking.

simple_explanation: Permission to sell food or drugs.
detailed_explanation: Certification that products meant for consumption or skin use meet safety and quality standards.
A Pay-As-You-Earn scheme where employers deduct personal income tax from staff and remit to the state.

simple_explanation: Permission from the local council to do business.
detailed_explanation: A permit issued by the Local Government Area (LGA) allowing a business to operate within its physical boundaries.
A certificate for businesses prone to money laundering to ensure they report large cash transactions.

simple_explanation: Insurance for workers who get hurt at work.
detailed_explanation: A mandatory contribution to the Employees' Compensation Scheme to cover workplace injuries or death.
